sentences.target: Das Konzert ist heute gratis für Studenten.
sentences.reading: /das kɔnˈtsɛʁt ɪst ˈhɔʏtə ˈɡʁaːtɪs fyːɐ ʃtuˈdɛntən/

translations.de: Das Konzert ist heute gratis für Studenten.
translations.ipa: /das kɔnˈtsɛʁt ɪst ˈhɔʏtə ˈɡʁaːtɪs fyːɐ ʃtuˈdɛntən/
translations.en: The concert is free today for students.
translations.es: El concierto es gratis hoy para los estudiantes.
translations.fr: Le concert est gratuit aujourd'hui pour les étudiants.
translations.it: Oggi il concerto è gratis per gli studenti.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天音乐会对学生免费。
translations.pt: O concerto é grátis hoje para estudantes.
translations.vi: Buổi hòa nhạc hôm nay miễn phí cho sinh viên.
translations.nl: Het concert is vandaag gratis voor studenten.
translations.hu: Ma a koncert ingyenes a diákoknak.
translations.hi: आज छात्रों के लिए कॉन्सर्ट मुफ्त है.
translations.pl: Koncert jest dziś bezpłatny dla studentów.
translations.el: Η συναυλία είναι σήμερα δωρεάν για φοιτητές.
translations.nb: Konserten er gratis i dag for studenter.
translations.id: Konser hari ini gratis untuk mahasiswa.
translations.sv: Konserten är gratis idag för studenter.
translations.ro: Concertul este gratuit astăzi pentru studenți.
translations.cs: Koncert je dnes zdarma pro studenty.
translations.da: Koncerten er gratis i dag for studerende.
translations.ja: 今日、学生は無料でコンサートに入れます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'Konzert'; nominative singular neuter; marks the subject.
Head noun; neuter nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb specifying when the state holds.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement ('at no cost').
Preposition introducing a beneficiary PP; governs accusative.
Plural noun; accusative as object of 'für'; denotes the beneficiaries.

sentences.target: Ich bekomme den Kaffee heute gratis.

translations.de: Ich bekomme den Kaffee heute gratis.
translations.en: I get the coffee for free today.
translations.es: Hoy el café me sale gratis.
translations.it: Oggi il caffè è gratis per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我可以免费喝咖啡。
translations.yue: 我今日可以免費攞杯咖啡。
translations.pt: Hoje eu ganho o café de graça.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi được uống cà phê miễn phí.
translations.nl: Vandaag krijg ik mijn koffie gratis.
translations.hi: आज मुझे कॉफी मुफ्त में मिल रही है.
translations.nb: I dag får jeg kaffe gratis.
translations.id: Hari ini saya dapat kopi gratis.
translations.da: I dag får jeg kaffe gratis.
translations.ja: 今日はコーヒーを無料でもらえます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object 'Kaffee'.
Noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'bekomme'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Adverbial modifier of 'bekomme' indicating manner ('at no cost').

sentences.target: Die Lieferung ist gratis ab zwanzig Euro.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈliːfəʁʊŋ ɪst ˈɡʁaːtɪs ap ˈtsvantsɪç ˈɔʏʁo/

translations.de: Die Lieferung ist gratis ab zwanzig Euro.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈliːfəʁʊŋ ɪst ˈɡʁaːtɪs ap ˈtsvantsɪç ˈɔʏʁo/
translations.en: Delivery is free from twenty euros.
translations.es: El envío es gratis a partir de veinte euros.
translations.fr: La livraison est gratuite à partir de vingt euros.
translations.it: La consegna è gratis a partire da venti euro.
translations.zh-Hans: 订单满二十欧元免运费。
translations.pt: A entrega é grátis a partir de vinte euros.
translations.vi: Miễn phí giao hàng từ 20 euro.
translations.ar: التوصيل مجاني ابتداء من عشرين يورو.
translations.nl: Bezorging is gratis vanaf twintig euro.
translations.hi: बीस यूरो से डिलीवरी मुफ्त है.
translations.pl: Dostawa jest darmowa od dwudziestu euro.
translations.el: Η αποστολή είναι δωρεάν από είκοσι ευρώ.
translations.nb: Frakt er gratis fra tjue euro.
translations.id: Pengiriman gratis mulai dari dua puluh euro.
translations.sv: Frakten är gratis från tjugo euro.
translations.ro: Livrarea este gratuită de la douăzeci de euro.
translations.cs: Doprava je zdarma od dvaceti eur.
translations.da: Levering er gratis fra tyve euro.
translations.fi: Toimitus on ilmainen yli 20 euron tilauksille.
translations.ja: 20ユーロ以上で送料は無料です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'Lieferung'; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate; present, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.
Preposition meaning 'starting from'; introduces a threshold PP; typically governs dative.
Cardinal numeral quantifying 'Euro'.
Currency noun; plural; object of the preposition 'ab' (dative), indicating the price threshold.

sentences.target: Die App ist gratis in der Grundversion.
sentences.reading: /diː ɛp ɪst ˈɡʁaːtɪs ɪn deːɐ ˈɡʁʊntvɛʁˌzi̯oːn/

translations.de: Die App ist gratis in der Grundversion.
translations.ipa: /diː ɛp ɪst ˈɡʁaːtɪs ɪn deːɐ ˈɡʁʊntvɛʁˌzi̯oːn/
translations.en: The app is free in the basic version.
translations.es: La aplicación es gratis en la versión básica.
translations.fr: L'application est gratuite dans sa version de base.
translations.it: L'app è gratis nella versione base.
translations.zh-Hans: 这款应用的基础版是免费的。
translations.pt: O aplicativo é gratuito na versão básica.
translations.he: הגרסה הבסיסית של האפליקציה היא בחינם.
translations.vi: Bản cơ bản của ứng dụng là miễn phí.
translations.nl: De app is gratis in de basisversie.
translations.hi: ऐप का बेसिक संस्करण मुफ्त है.
translations.el: Η βασική έκδοση της εφαρμογής είναι δωρεάν.
translations.ro: Versiunea de bază a aplicației este gratuită.
translations.ja: このアプリの基本版は無料です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'App'; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject.
Borrowed common noun; feminine nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary linking subject to predicate; present, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.
Preposition introducing a scope/location PP; here governs dative.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; marks the object of 'in'.
Compound noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'; specifies the edition.
